description: Phase 12A canonical clinical field libraries for protocol-grade source document generation. Core blocks are reusable; overlays are protocol-specific extensions.

VITALS_CORE_V1.description: Canonical vital signs and body measurements for interventional eSource.

validation.message: HR minimum 30
HR maximum 220
RR minimum 4
RR maximum 60
SBP minimum 70
SBP maximum 250
DBP minimum 40
DBP maximum 150
Temperature too low
Temperature too high
Weight required
Height required

fields.protocol_notes: May be derived from height/weight when both captured.

validation.message: Non-negative minutes
Maximum 60 minutes
Clinical comment required when clinically significant is Yes.

AE_CORE_V1.description: Canonical adverse event capture for interventional trials.

validation.message: Resolution date/time required unless AE is ongoing.
Seriousness category required when AE is serious.
Unblinding comment required when unblinding is Yes.
Follow-up plan required when follow-up is required.
End date required unless medication is ongoing.
Medical monitor comment required for prohibited therapy.
Linked AE required when related to AE is Yes.
Missed reason required when IP missed is Yes.
Kit number or IP number required when IP administered.
Second verifier name required when dual verification required.
Administered by required when IP administered is Yes.
Comment required when immediate AE observed is Yes.

LAB_CORE_V1.description: Canonical lab collection and result metadata (not full analyte panel).

validation.message: Fasting hours required when fasting status is fasting.
Clinical comment required when clinically significant is Yes.
Repeat reason and scheduled date required when repeat is required.
Linked AE ID required when linked to AE is Yes.
ECG date/time and interpretation required when ECG performed.
Clinical comment required when clinically significant is Yes.
Exam date/time required when exam performed is Yes.
Abnormal findings required when overall normal is No.
Investigator comment required when clinically significant is Yes.

PARA_ADRENAL_OVERLAY_V1.description: PARA adrenal insufficiency symptom overlay (namespaced fields).

PARA_HIT_OVERLAY_V1.description: PARA HIT / anti-PF4 monitoring overlay (namespaced fields).

validation.message: Min 0
Max 8

MV_HOUSEHOLD_SYMPTOM_OVERLAY_V1.description: VALIDATION_PROTOCOL_002 household symptom and swab overlay (namespaced fields).
